events.label: reasoning
events.text:
We need produce JSON answer. Need assess scenario: residential PEX & copper installation, rough-complete, observed field condition: crimp ring fails go/no-go gauge. Need decide compliance. Crimp ring failing go/no-go gauge means PEX fitting connection not properly crimped; defective/non-compliant. Decision fail. Risk high? Failed crimp can cause leak, water damage, maybe high. Work stage rough-complete. Component conditions installed-defective, non-compliant. Percent complete maybe 80? Value not asked, 0. Sound_source etc default empty string/0. Findings: crimp ring does not pass go/no-go gauge; connection not within manufacturer tolerance; potential leak path. Actions: remove/replace failed crimp rings, recalibrate tool, re-crimp per manufacturer, verify all with gauge, pressure test. Rationale: Go/no-go gauge verifies proper crimp dimensions; failure indicates incomplete/incorrect crimp violating IPC and mfr specs. References: IPC 604.7? Actually IPC PEX installation per standards; manufacturer specs; ASTM F1807 etc. Need valid JSON only, no prose. Ensure fields: decision, risk, work_stage, component_conditions, percent_complete, value, sound_source, confidence, event_time, rate, order, workable, findings, actions, rationale, references.

Need decide numeric percent_complete. Rough-complete maybe 85. Confidence 1.0. order empty list. workable empty list. sound_source empty string. event_time 0.0. rate 0.0.

Let's craft JSON.
